text: The department shall deposit payments received under a lease under this subchapter to the credit of the state highway fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.054 — Revenue from Leases

The department shall deposit payments received under a lease under this subchapter to the credit of the state highway fund.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall deposit payments received under a lease under this subchapter to the credit of the state highway fund.
